name: Wenzhou Yihua Connector Co., Ltd.
summary: Wenzhou Yihua Connector Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells electronic connectors in China. It offers network connectors, consumer electronic connectors and wire harness products, optical transceivers, and power and automotive connectors, as well as wired jacks and transformer series connectors. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Yueqing, China.
